title: feat: add provider safe deployment apply
goal: Add a provider-safe deployment/apply boundary behind approved manual gate records, with dry-run/apply separation, safe summaries, rollback evidence, and dashboard/external alert integration.
rollbackOrStopCondition: Revert this PR if provider apply can run production-like without an approved manual gate record and registry, if safe summaries expose secrets/private URLs/user data, or if required checks weaken.
forbiddenScope: actual production deployment apply without approved manual gate
external alert delivery with real provider credentials without approved manual gate
dashboard apply with real provider credentials without approved manual gate
live YouTube account operation without approved manual gate
doneCriteria: provider deployment dry-run succeeds without manual gate
production-like apply requires approved manual gate and registry
manualApproval boolean alone cannot authorize production-like apply
successful production-like apply marks gate used
failed provider apply does not mark gate used
dry-run does not mark gate used
safe apply summary excludes secrets/private URLs/wallet/raw user data
dashboard and external alert apply route through shared boundary
required checks pass on PR head
securityBoundaries: No real provider SDK apply is implemented.
No production deployment apply is executed.
Production-like apply requires an approved manual gate record and registry.
Manual approval boolean alone cannot authorize production-like apply.
Apply results are safe summaries only and exclude secret values, private URLs, wallet addresses, raw messages, raw display names, API keys, OAuth tokens, and webhook URLs.
No token sale, exchange, cash-out, custody, internal balance, investment wording, speculative reward, or YouTube scraping is introduced.
No unsafe GitHub logs are read.
residualRisks: Persistent manual gate storage remains future work.
Real provider SDK apply remains future work behind approved manual gate records.
Actual production deployment apply remains out of scope.
Local forge may be unavailable on this machine.
humanConfirmation: current head SHA verified after PR checks
CI status verified after PR checks
quality-gate status verified after PR checks

packageVerification.verification: No package scripts or runtime dependencies are changed.

apiCompatibilitySummary.statement: Adds an internal provider-safe deployment apply boundary and routes dashboard/external alert apply through it without changing external API, contract ABI, YouTube connector, Chain Listener, or IRIS delivery payloads.

runtimeSmokeRationale: No runtime readiness is claimed; this PR adds offline provider-safe apply boundaries and tests, not production deployment execution.

reviewScope.scope: Provider-safe deployment apply boundary, manual gate enforcement, safe summaries, docs, and evidence.
reviewScope.riskSummary: Main risk is accidental production-like apply without approved gate evidence or leaking provider secrets in apply summaries.
reviewScope.verificationOracle: Vitest coverage, typecheck, evidence CI, quality self-protection, secret scan, no-scraping scan, and GitHub checks.

oracle: Manual-gate tests, provider-safe deployment tests, existing dashboard/alert tests, local verification commands, evidence CI, and quality self-protection.
splitRequired: no - bounded provider-safe apply boundary with no real provider SDK and no production apply execution.
bestOfNEvidence: Candidate count: 3; selected candidate: shared provider-safe deployment boundary instead of duplicated dashboard/alert enforcement; reason selected: smallest safe common boundary with explicit manual gate registry and safe-summary controls.
reviewIndependence: Writer evidence is implementation tests and safe scans. Reviewer checklist verifies no manual gate bypass, no real provider credentials, no production apply, and no prohibited scope.
riskLevelSummary: R3 because product runtime-adjacent deployment apply boundaries and manual gate enforcement are changed.
filesOrScope: Provider-safe deployment apply source, dashboard/alert apply integration, docs, and .codex evidence.
solvabilityConstraints: No raw GitHub logs, no real provider SDK apply, no production secrets, no production deployment execution, no quality gate weakening.
reasoningEvidence: Audit of existing dashboard and alert manual gate enforcement identified duplication; shared boundary centralizes production-like gate and safe summary rules.
